turns.player_prompt: I scan the notice for taxes, curfew, and patrol lines.
turns.gm_text: The notice board reveals scant details about current levies and regulations. A tax notice mentions increased tariffs on trade goods, but no precise figures are posted. Curfew orders remain unchanged, calling for all to be indoors by nightfall, though enforcement patrol routes are only vaguely outlined, primarily along main roads. You spot mentions of routine patrols near the gate and the old milestone road, but specific timings or units aren’t listed.

turns.player_prompt: I ask a guard who commands the watch tonight.
turns.gm_text: The pause snaps when a nearby guard points with his spear-butt instead of waiting for you to choose. "Board, runner, or road," he says. "Pick one before the gate swallows the trail.".

turns.player_prompt: I greet the tavern runner and ask the loudest rumor.
turns.gm_text: The guard frowns. "That's all I've got."

turns.player_prompt: I mention the missing patrol and watch their face.
turns.gm_text: The pause snaps when a nearby guard points with his spear-butt instead of waiting for you to choose. "Board, runner, or road," he says. "Pick one before the gate swallows the trail.".

turns.player_prompt: I ask who posted the warning beside the tax lines.
turns.gm_text: No one immediately nearby claims responsibility for posting the warning beside the tax lines. The area is quiet except for the careful watch of the scavenger bandit lingering near the milestone, and none of the passing figures or present guards appear connected to the notice.
